notes: Stats and rules verified against Wahapedia datasheet.
Winged Hive Tyrant is a separate datasheet from the walking Hive Tyrant.
T9 W10 (lower than the walking variant T10 W14) with 2+/4++ save.
Carries Fly keyword and 12" move; cannot join bodyguard units.
Points cost subject to Balance Dataslate updates — verify on Wahapedia for current value.
FIXTURE REQUIREMENT: Needs 'Xenos - Tyranids.cat' loaded to test against live data.
To add the fixture: download from https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-10e and place in test/

knownDiscrepancies.note: Synaptic Imperative is not a standalone <rule> node in the BSData catalog; it appears as a named ability group / profile category header. The pipeline surfaces only materialised rule nodes, so this name is never emitted. Removed from expectedRules; absence is correct pipeline behaviour for this fixture version.

Shadow in the Warp was previously dropped because _resolveInfoLink only materialised links whose target is a <profile> node. Fixed in M5: _resolveInfoLink now accepts <rule> targets and materialises them as synthetic ability BoundProfiles via _bindRuleNodeAsProfile. Description is extracted robustly from both <description> and characteristic-based XML forms. Rule count changed from 236 (spurious) to ~6 (correct order of magnitude for a Monster/Character unit).

Wahapedia labels this ability 'Paroxysm'; the BSData catalog stores the full 10th-ed form 'Paroxysm (Psychic)'. The pipeline emits the catalog name verbatim. expectedRules updated to 'Paroxysm (Psychic)' to match catalog. descriptionSubstring 'Fight phase' still matches the catalog description.

Previously descriptionSubstring was 'Battleshock' (no hyphen, Wahapedia spelling). Catalog description uses 'Battle-shock' (hyphenated). Updated to 'Battle-shock' to match the literal catalog text so the substring check passes.
Fixture left unmodified per raw-source audit policy. Audit should surface this discrepancy, not silence it. Same defect present in the walking Hive Tyrant fixture.

Heavy Venom Cannon weapon profile in Library - Tyranids.cat has older stats: A=D3, BS=2+, S=9, D=3. Wahapedia shows A=3, BS=4+, S=10, D=D6+1. Catalog version drift in the shared library weapon profile. Same discrepancy affects the walking Hive Tyrant.
Stranglethorn Cannon in Library - Tyranids.cat has A=D6+1, BS=2+, S=7. Wahapedia shows A=D6+3, BS=4+, S=8. D stat is correct (both D=2). Catalog version drift in shared library weapon profile.

Tyrant talons appears in the Winged Hive Tyrant BSData entry but is not listed on the Wahapedia Winged Hive Tyrant datasheet. Likely a weapon option visible in the BattleScribe builder but not part of the standard loadout. Policy decision: show all possible options vs equipped/datasheet-listed only.
